vocab.meaning: rất gần, chỉ cách một quãng ngắn
vocab.example: I'd love to have a library just a stone's throw away from my apartment so I could go there every weekend.

vocab.meaning: một luồng gió mới (điều gì đó mới mẻ và tích cực)
vocab.example: Adding a new park in this congested neighborhood would be a real breath of fresh air for all the residents.

vocab.meaning: khu rừng bê tông (nơi đô thị hóa quá mức, thiếu cây xanh)
vocab.example: Living in a concrete jungle can be draining, so we desperately need more green spaces to escape the grayness.

vocab.meaning: ngay gần sát nhà, rất tiện lợi
vocab.example: Having a community center right at my doorstep would make it so much easier to participate in local events.

vocab.meaning: hồi phục năng lượng, nghỉ ngơi
vocab.example: I believe more public squares would provide a place for people to recharge their batteries after a stressful workday.

vocab.meaning: linh hồn của (nơi nhộn nhịp, đầy sức sống nhất)
vocab.example: The local park is the life and soul of our area; it's where everyone gathers to socialize and have fun.
Open spaces in my district are few and far between, which is why I’m strongly in favor of building more.

vocab.meaning: phần thiết yếu, không thể tách rời
vocab.example: Public amenities should be part and parcel of any modern residential development plan.

vocab.meaning: một bữa tiệc cho đôi mắt (thứ gì đó rất đẹp)
vocab.example: A well-designed botanical garden would be a feast for the eyes and a great spot for weekend walks.

vocab.meaning: đúng thứ mình cần, làm thỏa mãn hoàn toàn
vocab.example: A quiet, modern co-working space in my neighborhood would really hit the spot for someone like me who works remotely.
